                        \n                                    \n                                        \n                                            Regulation\n                                        \n                                        \n                                            \n                                                Закон о спрецавању прања новца и финансирања тероризма (Law on the Prevention of Money Laundering and Terrorism Financing)\n                                            \n                                        \n                                    \n                                    \n                                        \n                                            Regulatory body\n                                        \n                                        \n                                            \n                                                Централна банка Црне Горе (Central Bank of Montenegro)\n                                            \n                                        \n                                                                        \n                                    \n                                        \n                                            Threshold\n                                        \n                                        \n                                            No threshold. The Travel Rule applies to all virtual asset transfers irrespective of value.\n                                        \n                                    \n                                    \n                                        \n                                            Data to be shared\n                                        \n                                        \n                                            Natural Person\n                                            Originator:\n                                            \n                                                Full official name;\n                                                \n                                                    Distributed ledger address and crypto-asset account number: If the transfer is registered on a DLT network,\n                                                    include the distributed ledger address and the crypto-asset account number if it exists and is used. If not\n                                                    registered on a DLT network, provide the crypto-asset account number;\n                                                \n                                                \n                                                    Address and identification information: i) address, including country name; ii) personal identification document\n                                                    number; iii) unique personal identification number, or date and place of birth.\n                                                \n                                            \n                                            Beneficiary:\n                                            \n                                                Full official name;\n                                                \n                                                    Distributed ledger address and crypto-asset account number: If the transfer is registered on a DLT network,\n                                                    include the distributed ledger address and the crypto-asset account number if it exists and is used. If not\n                                                    registered on a DLT network, provide the crypto-asset account number.\n                                                \n                                            \n                                            Legal Entity\n                                            Originator:\n                                            \n                                                Registered name;\n                                                \n                                                    Distributed ledger address and crypto-asset account number: If the transfer is registered on a DLT network,\n                                                    include the distributed ledger address and the crypto-asset account number if it exists and is used. If not\n                                                    registered on a DLT network, provide the crypto-asset account number;\n                                                \n                                                \n                                                    Address and identification information: i) registered office address, including country name; ii) company\n                                                    registration number.\n                                                \n                                                \n                                                    Legal entity identifier (LEI) or equivalent identifier. The alternative identifier must: i) be a unique\n                                                    identification code for the legal entity; ii) be published in public registries; iii) be automatically issued\n                                                    upon entity formation by a public authority; iv) allow identification of name and address elements; v) be\n                                                    accompanied by a description of the identifier type in the messaging system.\n                                                \n                                            \n                                            Beneficiary:\n                                            \n                                                Registered name;\n                                                \n                                                    Distributed ledger address and crypto-asset account number: If the transfer is registered on a DLT network,\n                                                    include the distributed ledger address and the crypto-asset account number if it exists and is used. If not\n                                                    registered on a DLT network, provide the crypto-asset account number;\n                                                \n                                                \n                                                    Legal entity identifier (LEI) or equivalent identifier. The alternative identifier must: i) be a unique\n                                                    identification code for the legal entity; ii) be published in public registries; iii) be automatically issued\n                                                    upon entity formation by a public authority; iv) allow identification of name and address elements; v) be\n                                                    accompanied by a description of the identifier type in the messaging system.\n                                                \n                                            \n                                        \n                                    \n                                \n                            \n                        \n                    \n                \n            \n\n            \n            Specific requirements\n            \n                \n                \n                    \n                        \n                            \n                                \n                                    \n                                        Subject\n                                    \n                                    \n                                        Details\n                                    \n                                \n                                \n                                    \n                                        \n                                            Threshold-based data\n                                        \n                                        \n                                            —\n                                        \n                                    \n                                    \n                                        \n                                            Domestic vs cross-border transfers\n                                        \n                                        \n                                            No difference.\n                                        \n                                    \n                                    \n                                        \n                                            Batch file transfer\n                                        \n                                        \n                                            In the case of a batch file transfer of crypto-assets from a single originator, the obligation on the CASP of the originator to ensure that transfers of crypto-assets are accompanied by the required information shall not apply to the individual transfers bundled together therein, provided that the batch file contains the information on the originator and beneficiary, that that information has been verified, and that the individual transfers carry the distributed ledger address of the originator where this is applicable, the crypto-asset account number of the originator where this is applicable, or the unique transaction identifier where this is applicable.\n                                        \n                                    \n                                    \n                                        \n                                            Unhosted wallet verification\n                                        \n                                        \n                                            Required for transactions exceeding EUR 1,000.\n                                        \n                                    \n                                    \n                                        \n                                            VASP Due Diligence\n                                        \n                                        \n                                            No requirement.\n                                        \n                                    \n                                    \n                                        \n                                            Time and way to share the Information\n                                        \n                                        \n                                            The required information shall be transmitted immediately and in a secure manner, and no later than the initiation of the blockchain transaction.\n                                        \n                                           \n                                    \n                                        \n                                            Record retention\n                                        \n                                        \n                                            Five years.\n                                        \n                                    \n                                \n                            \n                        \n                    \n                \n            \n\n            \n            Main actions required\n            \n                \n                    Obligations of the originating CASP\n                    The originating CASP must:\n                    \n                        \n                            obtain information about the originator and beneficiary from a client who initiated a crypto-asset transfer;\n                        \n                        \n                            in accordance with the targeted financial sanctions regime, conduct AML screening against both the originator\n                            and beneficiary;\n                        \n                        \n                            verify information about the originator by comparing it with the information gathered during the KYC or KYB;\n                        \n                        \n                            carry out wallet attribution to establish which type of wallet – custodial or self-hosted – is used on the other\n                            end and, if it is a custodial one, establish which CASP controls the wallet;\n                        \n                        verify a self-hosted wallet to which the crypto-assets should be sent (if applicable);\n                        conduct transaction monitoring and report to the FIU if a suspicious transaction is identified;\n                        transmit information about the originator and beneficiary to the beneficiary or intermediary CASP; and\n                        keep records related to the transfer for as long as required by national legislation.\n                    \n                    Obligations of the beneficiary CASP\n                    The beneficiary CASP must:\n                    \n                        \n                            carry out wallet attribution to establish which type of wallet – custodial or self-hosted – is used on the other\n                            end and, if it is a custodial one, establish which CASP controls the wallet (if necessary);\n                        \n                        verify a self-hosted wallet from which the crypto-assets were received (if applicable);\n                        \n                            receive information about the originator and beneficiary from the originating or intermediary CASP (or obtain it\n                            directly from its customer if assets are received from a self-hosted wallet) and ensure that the received\n                            information is complete by comparing it with the requirements in the originating CASP's jurisdiction;\n                        \n                        \n                            in accordance with the targeted financial sanctions regime, conduct AML screening against both the originator\n                            and beneficiary;\n                        \n                        \n                            verify information about the beneficiary by comparing it with the information gathered during the KYC or KYB;\n                        \n                        conduct transaction monitoring and report to the FIU if a suspicious transaction is identified; and\n                        keep records related to the transfer for as long as required by national legislation.\n                    \n                    Obligations of the intermediary CASP\n                    The intermediary CASP must:\n                    \n                        \n                            receive information about the originator and beneficiary from the previous CASP in the chain and ensure that the\n                            received information is complete by comparing it with the requirements in the originating CASP's jurisdiction;\n                        \n                        \n                            in accordance with the targeted financial sanctions regime, conduct AML screening against both the originator\n                            and beneficiary;\n                        \n                        \n                            carry out wallet attribution to establish which type of wallet – custodial or self-hosted – is used on the other\n                            end and, if it is a custodial one, establish which CASP controls the wallet;\n                        \n                        \n                            verify a self-hosted wallet from which the crypto-assets were received or to which they should be sent (if\n                            applicable);\n                        \n                        conduct transaction monitoring and report to the FIU if a suspicious transaction is identified;\n                        transmit information about the originator and beneficiary to the beneficiary or intermediary CASP; and\n                        keep records related to the transfer for as long as required by national legislation.\n                    \n                \n            \n\n        \n    \n\n    \n        \n        \n                        Regulation\n                                        \n                                        \n                                            \n                                                Virtual Assets Act\n                                                General Notice No. 510 - Bank of Namibia: Travel Rules: Virtual Assets Act, 2023\n                                            \n                                        \n                                    \n                                    \n                                        \n                                            Regulatory body\n                                        \n                                        \n                                            \n                                                Bank of Namibia\n                                                Financial Intelligence Centre\n                                                Namibia Financial Institutions Supervisory Authority (NAMFISA)\n                                            \n                                        \n                                                                        \n                                    \n                                        \n                                            Threshold\n                                        \n                                        \n                                            No threshold. The Travel Rule applies to all virtual asset transfers irrespective of value.\n                                        \n                                    \n                                    \n                                        \n                                            Data to be shared\n                                        \n                                        \n                                            Originator:\n                                            \n                                                a) Full name;\n                                                b) Virtual asset account number (or unique transaction reference number);\n                                                c) One of the following: address; or national identity card number or passport number; or customer identification number; or place of birth.\n                                            \n                                            Beneficiary:\n                                            \n                                                g) Full name;\n                                                h) Virtual asset account number (or unique transaction reference number).\n                                            \n                                        \n                                    \n                                \n                            \n             \n                            \n                                \n                                    \n                                        Subject\n                                    \n                                    \n                                        Details\n                                    \n                                \n                                \n                                    \n                                        \n                                            Threshold-based data\n                                        \n                                        \n                                            —\n                                        \n                                    \n                                    \n                                        \n                                            Domestic vs cross-border transfers\n                                        \n                                        \n                                            No difference.                                        \n                                        \n                                    \n                                    \n                                        \n                                            Batch file transfer\n                                        \n                                        \n                                            For batch file transfers of virtual assets from a single originator, the individual transfers of virtual assets bundled must contain the following information:\n                                            Originator:\n                                            \n                                                a) Full name;\n                                                b) Account number;\n                                                c) One of the following: address; or national identity card number or passport number; or customer identification number; or date and place of birth;\n                                                d) Individual transfers of virtual assets must carry the account number or unique identifier;\n                                                e) Any other information and documents as the The Bank of Namibia may require.\n                                            \n                                            Beneficiary:\n                                            \n                                                f) Full name;\n                                                g) Account number (or unique identifier that is traceable in the beneficiary&rsquo;s country).\n                                            \n                                        \n                                    \n                                    \n                                        \n                                            Unhosted wallet verification\n                                        \n                                        \n                                            No requirement. May be applied based on risk assessment.\n                                        \n                                    \n                                    \n                                        \n                                            VASP Due Diligence\n                                        \n                                        \n                                            No requirement.\n                                        \n                                    \n                                    \n                                        \n                                            Time and way to share the Information\n                                        \n                                        \n                                            The required information shall be transmitted immediately and in a secure manner.\n                                        \n                                           \n                                    \n                                        \n                                            Record retention\n                                        \n                                        \n                                            5 years.\n                                        \n                                    \n                                \n                            \n                        \n                    \n                \n            \n\n            \n            Main actions required\n            \n                \n                    Obligations of the originating VASP\n                    The originating VASP must:\n                    \n                        obtain information about the originator and beneficiary from a client who initiated a virtual asset transfer;\n                        in accordance with the targeted financial sanctions regime, conduct AML screening against both the originator and beneficiary;\n                        verify information about the originator by comparing it with the information gathered during the KYC or KYB;\n                        carry out wallet attribution to establish which type of wallet &ndash; custodial or unhosted &ndash; is used on the other end and, if it is a custodial one, establish which VASP controls the wallet;\n                        conduct transaction monitoring and report to the FIU if a suspicious transaction is identified;\n                        transmit information about the originator and beneficiary to the beneficiary or intermediary VASP; and\n                        keep records related to the transfer for as long as required by national legislation.\n                    \n                    Obligations of the beneficiary VASP\n                    The beneficiary VASP must:\n                    \n                        carry out wallet attribution to establish which type of wallet &ndash; custodial or unhosted &ndash; is used on the other end and, if it is a custodial one, establish which VASP controls the wallet (if necessary);\n                        \n                            receive information about the originator and beneficiary from the originating or intermediary VASP (or obtain it directly from its customer if assets are received from an unhosted wallet) and ensure that the received information is\n                            complete by comparing it with the requirements in the originating VASP's jurisdiction;\n                        \n                        in accordance with the targeted financial sanctions regime, conduct AML screening against both the originator and beneficiary;\n                        verify information about the beneficiary by comparing it with the information gathered during the KYC or KYB;\n                        conduct transaction monitoring and report to the FIU if a suspicious transaction is identified; and\n                        keep records related to the transfer for as long as required by national legislation.\n                    \n                    Obligations of the intermediary VASP\n                    The intermediary VASP must:\n                    \n                        receive information about the originator and beneficiary from the previous VASP in the chain and ensure that the received information is complete by comparing it with the requirements in the originating VASP's jurisdiction;\n                        in accordance with the targeted financial sanctions regime, conduct AML screening against both the originator and beneficiary;\n                        carry out wallet attribution to establish which type of wallet &ndash; custodial or unhosted &ndash; is used on the other end and, if it is a custodial one, establish which VASP controls the wallet;\n                        conduct transaction monitoring and report to the FIU if a suspicious transaction is identified;\n                        transmit information about the originator and beneficiary to the beneficiary or intermediary VASP; and\n                        keep records related to the transfer for as long as required by national legislation.\n                                       \n                \n            \n\n        \n    \n\n    \n        \n        \n            \n            General information\n            \n                \n                \n                    \n                        \n                            \n                                \n                                    \n                                        Subject\n                                    \n                                    \n                                        Details\n                                    \n                                \n                                \n                                    \n                                        \n                                            Status\n                                        \n                                        \n                                            In force from December 30, 2024.\n                                        \n                                    \n                                    \n                                        \n                                            Regulation\n                                        \n                                        \n                                            \n                                                Regulation (EU) 2023/1113\n                                                Travel rule Guidelines\n                                                Wet ter voorkoming van witwassen en financieren van terrorisme\n                                            \n                                        \n                                    \n                                    \n                                        \n                                            Regulatory body\n                                        \n                                        \n                                            \n                                                Autoriteit Financiële Markten (AFM)\n                                            \n                                        \n                                                                        \n                                    \n                                        \n                                            Threshold\n                                        \n                                        \n                                            No threshold. The Travel Rule applies to all crypto-asset transfers irrespective of value.\n                                        \n                                    \n                                    \n                                        \n                                            Data to be shared\n                                        \n                                        \n                                            Natural Person\n                                            Originator:\n                                            \n                                                a) Full official name;\n                                                \n                                                    b) Distributed ledger address and crypto-asset account number: If the transfer is registered on a DLT network, include the distributed ledger address and the crypto-asset account number if it exists and is used. If not registered on\n                                                    a DLT network, provide the crypto-asset account number;\n                                                \n                                                c) Address and identification information: i) habitual residence, including country name; ii) official personal document number; iii) customer identification number, or date and place of birth.\n                                            \n                                            Beneficiary:\n                                            \n                                                d) Full official name;\n                                                \n                                                    e) Distributed ledger address and crypto-asset account number: If the transfer is registered on a DLT network, include the distributed ledger address and the crypto-asset account number if it exists and is used. If not registered on\n                                                    a DLT network, provide the crypto-asset account number.\n                                                \n                                            \n                                            Legal Entity\n                                            Originator:\n                                            \n                                                f) Registered name;\n                                                \n                                                    g) Distributed ledger address and crypto-asset account number: If the transfer is registered on a DLT network, include the distributed ledger address and the crypto-asset account number if it exists and is used. If not registered on\n                                                    a DLT network, provide the crypto-asset account number;\n                                                \n                                                h) Registered office address;\n                                                \n                                                    i) Legal Entity Identifier (LEI) or equivalent identifier. The alternative identifier must: i) be a unique identification code for the legal entity; ii) be published in public registries; iii) be automatically issued upon entity\n                                                    formation by a public authority; iv) allow identification of name and address elements; v) be accompanied by a description of the identifier type in the messaging system.\n                                                \n                                            \n                                            Beneficiary:\n                                            \n                                                j) Registered name;\n                                                \n                                                    k) Distributed ledger address and crypto-asset account number: If the transfer is registered on a DLT network, include the distributed ledger address and the crypto-asset account number if it exists and is used. If not registered on\n                                                    a DLT network, provide the crypto-asset account number;\n                                                \n                                                \n                                                    l) Legal Entity Identifier (LEI) or equivalent identifier. The alternative identifier must: i) be a unique identification code for the legal entity; ii) be published in public registries; iii) be automatically issued upon entity\n                                                    formation by a public authority; iv) allow identification of name and address elements; v) be accompanied by a description of the identifier type in the messaging system.\n                                                \n                                            \n                                        \n                                    \n                                \n                            \n                        \n                    \n                \n            \n\n            \n            Specific requirements\n            \n                \n                \n                    \n                        \n                            \n                                \n                                    \n                                        Subject\n                                    \n                                    \n                                        Details\n                                    \n                                \n                                \n                                    \n                                        \n                                            Threshold-based data\n                                        \n                                        \n                                            —\n                                        \n                                    \n                                    \n                                        \n                                            Domestic vs cross-border transfers\n                                        \n                                        \n                                            No difference.                                        \n                                        \n                                    \n                                    \n                                        \n                                            Batch file transfer\n                                        \n                                        \n                                            In the case of a batch file transfer of crypto-assets from a single originator, the obligation on the CASP of the originator to ensure that transfers of crypto-assets are accompanied by the required information shall not apply to the individual transfers bundled together therein, provided that the batch file contains the information on the originator and beneficiary, that that information has been verified, and that the individual transfers carry the distributed ledger address of the originator where this is applicable, the crypto-asset account number of the originator where this is applicable, or the unique transaction identifier where this is applicable.\n                                        \n                                    \n                                    \n                                        \n                                            Unhosted wallet verification\n                                        \n                                        \n                                            Required for transactions exceeding EUR 1,000.\n                                        \n                                    \n                                    \n                                        \n                                            VASP Due Diligence\n                                        \n                                        \n                                            When establishing a correspondent relationship with a CASP registered outside the EU.\n                                        \n                                    \n                                    \n                                        \n                                            Time and way to share the Information\n                                        \n                                        \n                                            The required information shall be transmitted immediately and in a secure manner, and no later than the initiation of the blockchain transaction.\n                                        \n                                           \n                                    \n                                        \n                                            Record retention\n                                        \n                                        \n                                            5 years.\n                                        \n                                    \n                                \n                            \n                        \n                    \n                \n            \n\n            \n            Main actions required\n            \n                \n                    Obligations of the originating CASP\n                    The originating CASP must:\n                    \n                        obtain information about the originator and beneficiary from a client who initiated a crypto-asset transfer;\n                        in accordance with the targeted financial sanctions regime, conduct AML screening against both the originator and beneficiary;\n                        verify information about the originator by comparing it with the information gathered during the KYC or KYB;\n                        carry out wallet attribution to establish which type of wallet &ndash; custodial or self-hosted &ndash; is used on the other end and, if it is a custodial one, establish which CASP controls the wallet;\n                        conduct VASP Due Diligence (if applicable);\n                        verify a self-hosted wallet to which the crypto-assets should be sent (if applicable);\n                        conduct transaction monitoring and report to the FIU if a suspicious transaction is identified;\n                        transmit information about the originator and beneficiary to the beneficiary or intermediary CASP; and\n                        keep records related to the transfer for as long as required by national legislation.\n                    \n                    Obligations of the beneficiary CASP\n                    The beneficiary CASP must:\n                    \n                        carry out wallet attribution to establish which type of wallet &ndash; custodial or self-hosted &ndash; is used on the other end and, if it is a custodial one, establish which CASP controls the wallet (if necessary);\n                        conduct VASP Due Diligence (if applicable);\n                        verify a self-hosted wallet from which the crypto-assets were received (if applicable);\n                        \n                            receive information about the originator and beneficiary from the originating or intermediary VASP (or obtain it directly from its customer if assets are received from a self-hosted wallet) and ensure that the received information\n                            is complete by comparing it with the requirements in the originating CASP's jurisdiction;\n                        \n                        in accordance with the targeted financial sanctions regime, conduct AML screening against both the originator and beneficiary;\n                        verify information about the beneficiary by comparing it with the information gathered during the KYC or KYB;\n                        conduct transaction monitoring and report to the FIU if a suspicious transaction is identified; and\n                        keep records related to the transfer for as long as required by national legislation.\n                    \n                    Obligations of the intermediary CASP\n                    The intermediary CASP must:\n                    \n                        receive information about the originator and beneficiary from the previous CASP in the chain and ensure that the received information is complete by comparing it with the requirements in the originating VASP's jurisdiction;\n                        in accordance with the targeted financial sanctions regime, conduct AML screening against both the originator and beneficiary;\n                        carry out wallet attribution to establish which type of wallet &ndash; custodial or self-hosted &ndash; is used on the other end and, if it is a custodial one, establish which CASP controls the wallet;\n                        conduct VASP Due Diligence (if applicable);\n                        verify a self-hosted wallet from which the crypto-assets were received or to which they should be sent (if applicable);\n                        conduct transaction monitoring and report to the FIU if a suspicious transaction is identified;\n                        transmit information about the originator and beneficiary to the beneficiary or intermediary CASP; and\n                        keep records related to the transfer for as long as required by national legislation.\n                                       \n                \n            \n\n        \n    \n\n    \n        \n        \n            \n            General information\n            \n                \n                \n                    \n                        \n                            \n                                \n                                    \n                                        Subject\n                                    \n                                    \n                                        Details\n                                    \n                                \n                                \n                                    \n                                        \n                                            Status\n                                        \n                                        \n                                            In force from June 1, 2024.\n                                        \n                                    \n                                    \n                                        \n                                            Regulation\n                                        \n                                        \n                                            \n                                                Anti-Money Laundering and Countering Financing of Terrorism (Requirements and Compliance) Amendment Regulations 2023\n                                                Anti-Money Laundering and Countering Financing of Terrorism Act 2009\n                                                Guidance: New regulations for Virtual Asset Service Provider\n                                            \n                                        \n                                    \n                                    \n                                        \n                                            Regulatory body\n                                        \n                                        \n                                            \n                                                Financial Markets Authority (FMA)\n                                            \n                                        \n                                                                        \n                                    \n                                        \n                                            Threshold\n                                        \n                                        \n                                            No threshold. The Travel Rule applies to all virtual asset transfers irrespective of value.\n                                        \n                                    \n                                    \n                                        \n                                            Data to be shared\n                                        \n                                        \n                                            Originator:\n                                            \n                                                a) Full name;\n                                                b) Account number or other identifying information;\n                                            \n                                            One of the following:\n                                            \n                                                c) Address;\n                                                d) National identity number;\n                                                e) Customer identification number;\n                                                f) Place and date of birth.\n                                            \n                                            Beneficiary:\n                                            \n                                                g) Full name;\n                                                h) Account number (or a unique transaction reference number).\n                                            \n                                        \n                                    \n                                \n                            \n                        \n                    \n                \n            \n\n            \n            Specific requirements\n            \n                \n                \n                    \n                        \n                            \n                                \n                                    \n                                        Subject\n                                    \n                                    \n                                        Details\n                                    \n                                \n                                \n                                    \n                                        \n                                            Threshold-based data\n                                        \n                                        \n                                            —\n                                        \n                                    \n                                    \n                                        \n                                            Domestic vs cross-border transfers\n                                        \n                                        \n                                            There is a difference.\n                                            Domestic. The following data needs to be transfered: b), but a), c), d), e), f), g) or other information should be provided within three working days after the request.\n                                            Cross-border: a), b), c), d), e), f), g), h).                                        \n                                        \n                                    \n                                    \n                                        \n                                            Batch file transfer\n                                        \n                                        \n                                            No special provisions.\n                                        \n                                    \n                                    \n                                        \n                                            Unhosted wallet verification\n                                        \n                                        \n                                            No requirement. May be applied based on risk assessment.\n                                        \n                                    \n                                    \n                                        \n                                            VASP Due Diligence\n                                        \n                                        \n                                            No requirement.\n                                        \n                                    \n                                    \n                                        \n                                            Time and way to share the Information\n                                        \n                                        \n                                            Any information about the originator obtained by a reporting entity that is an intermediary institution must be provided by that reporting entity to the beneficiary institution as soon as practicable.\n                                            The information obtained by the reporting entity must accompany the wire transfer.\n                                        \n                                           \n                                    \n                                        \n                                            Record retention\n                                        \n                                        \n                                            5 years.\n                                        \n                                    \n                                \n                            \n                        \n                    \n                \n            \n\n            \n            Main actions required\n            \n                \n                    Obligations of the originating VASP\n                    The originating VASP must:\n                    \n                        obtain information about the originator and beneficiary from a client who initiated a virtual asset transfer;\n                        in accordance with the targeted financial sanctions regime, conduct AML screening against both the originator and beneficiary;\n                        verify information about the originator by comparing it with the information gathered during the KYC or KYB;\n                        carry out wallet attribution to establish which type of wallet &ndash; custodial or unhosted &ndash; is used on the other end and, if it is a custodial one, establish which VASP controls the wallet;\n                        conduct transaction monitoring and report to the FIU if a suspicious transaction is identified;\n                        transmit information about the originator and beneficiary to the beneficiary or intermediary VASP; and\n                        keep records related to the transfer for as long as required by national legislation.\n                    \n                    Obligations of the beneficiary VASP\n                    The beneficiary VASP must:\n                    \n                        carry out wallet attribution to establish which type of wallet &ndash; custodial or unhosted &ndash; is used on the other end and, if it is a custodial one, establish which VASP controls the wallet (if necessary);\n                        \n                            receive information about the originator and beneficiary from the originating or intermediary VASP (or obtain it directly from its customer if assets are received from an unhosted wallet) and ensure that the received information is\n                            complete by comparing it with the requirements in the originating VASP's jurisdiction;\n                        \n                        in accordance with the targeted financial sanctions regime, conduct AML screening against both the originator and beneficiary;\n                        verify information about the beneficiary by comparing it with the information gathered during the KYC or KYB;\n                        conduct transaction monitoring and report to the FIU if a suspicious transaction is identified; and\n                        keep records related to the transfer for as long as required by national legislation.\n                    \n                    Obligations of the intermediary VASP\n                    The intermediary VASP must:\n                    \n                        receive information about the originator and beneficiary from the previous VASP in the chain and ensure that the received information is complete by comparing it with the requirements in the originating VASP's jurisdiction;\n                        in accordance with the targeted financial sanctions regime, conduct AML screening against both the originator and beneficiary;\n                        carry out wallet attribution to establish which type of wallet &ndash; custodial or unhosted &ndash; is used on the other end and, if it is a custodial one, establish which VASP controls the wallet;\n                        conduct transaction monitoring and report to the FIU if a suspicious transaction is identified;\n                        transmit information about the originator and beneficiary to the beneficiary or intermediary VASP; and\n                        keep records related to the transfer for as long as required by national legislation.\n                                       \n                \n            \n\n        \n    \n\n    \n        \n        \n            \n            General information\n            \n                \n                \n                    \n                        \n                            \n                                \n                                    \n                                        Subject\n                                    \n                                    \n                                        Details\n                                    \n                                \n                                \n                                    \n                                        \n                                            Status\n                                        \n                                        \n                                            In force from January 9, 2025.\n                                        \n                                    \n                                    \n                                        \n                                            Regulation\n                                        \n                                        \n                                            \n                                                Resolución No. UAF-N-026-2025\n                                            \n                                        \n                                    \n                                    \n                                        \n                                            Regulatory body\n                                        \n                                        \n                                            \n                                                Unidad de Análisis Financiero\n                                            \n                                        \n                                                                        \n                                    \n                                        \n                                            Threshold\n                                        \n                                        \n                                            No threshold. The Travel Rule applies to all virtual asset transfers irrespective of value.\n                                        \n                                    \n                                    \n                                        \n                                            Data to be shared\n                                        \n                                        \n                                            Natural Person\n                                            Originator:\n                                            \n                                                a) Name;\n                                                \n                                                    b) Distributed ledger address, in cases where the virtual asset transfer is recorded on a network using distributed ledger technology (DLT) or similar technology, and the originator's virtual asset account number, where such account\n                                                    exists and is used to process the transaction. In cases where the transfer is not recorded on a DLT network or similar technology, the virtual asset account number should be provided;\n                                                \n                                                c) Address, official identity document number or customer identification number, or date and place of birth.\n                                            \n                                            Beneficiary:\n                                            \n                                                d) Name;\n                                                \n                                                    e) Distributed ledger address, in cases where the virtual asset transfer is recorded on a network using distributed ledger technology (DLT) or similar technology, and the originator's virtual asset account number, where such account\n                                                    exists and is used to process the transaction. In cases where the transfer is not recorded on a DLT network or similar technology, the virtual asset account number should be provided.\n                                                \n                                            \n                                            Legal Entity\n                                            Originator:\n                                            \n                                                f) Registered name;\n                                                \n                                                    g) Distributed ledger address, in cases where the virtual asset transfer is recorded on a network using distributed ledger technology (DLT) or similar technology, and the originator's virtual asset account number, where such account\n                                                    exists and is used to process the transaction. In cases where the transfer is not recorded on a DLT network or similar technology, the virtual asset account number should be provided;\n                                                \n                                                h) Address, official identification document number or customer identification number.\n                                            \n                                            Beneficiary:\n                                            \n                                                i) Registered name;\n                                                \n                                                    j) Distributed ledger address, in cases where the virtual asset transfer is recorded on a network using distributed ledger technology (DLT) or similar technology, and the originator's virtual asset account number, where such account\n                                                    exists and is used to process the transaction. In cases where the transfer is not recorded on a DLT network or similar technology, the virtual asset account number should be provided.\n                                                \n                                            \n                                        \n                                    \n                                \n                            \n                        \n                    \n                \n            \n\n            \n            Specific requirements\n            \n                \n                \n                    \n                        \n                            \n                                \n                                    \n                                        Subject\n                                    \n                                    \n                                        Details\n                                    \n                                \n                                \n                                    \n                                        \n                                            Threshold-based data\n                                        \n                                        \n                                            —\n                                        \n                                    \n                                    \n                                        \n                                            Domestic vs cross-border transfers\n                                        \n                                        \n                                            There is a difference.\n                                            Domestic transfer\n                                            \n                                                Natural Person: a), b), c), d), e).\n                                                Legal Entity: f), g), h), i), j).\n                                            \n                                            \n                                                In the case of domestic virtual asset transfers, where the beneficiary VASP already holds the originator's and beneficiary's information, the originating VASP may include only the transaction identifier, provided it allows tracing of\n                                                the virtual asset transfer to either the originator or the beneficiary. If the beneficiary VASP or competent authorities request the full information, the originating VASP shall provide it within three working days of the request.\n                                            \n                                            Cross-border\n                                            \n                                                Natural Person: a), b), c), d), e).\n                                                Legal Entity: f), g), h), i), j).\n                                                                                    \n                                        \n                                    \n                                    \n                                        \n                                            Batch file transfer\n                                        \n                                        \n                                            Where multiple individual virtual asset transfers from a single originator are bundled into a single batch file for transmission to beneficiaries, the file must contain the required information, which must be fully traceable in the beneficiary’s jurisdiction and include the originator’s distributed ledger address, the virtual asset account number, or a unique identifier or transaction reference number.\n                                        \n                                    \n                                    \n                                        \n                                            Unhosted wallet verification\n                                        \n                                        \n                                            Required for transactions exceeding USD 1,000.\n                                        \n                                    \n                                    \n                                        \n                                            VASP Due Diligence\n                                        \n                                        \n                                            No requirement.\n                                        \n                                    \n                                    \n                                        \n                                            Time and way to share the Information\n                                        \n                                        \n                                            The required information shall be provided securely and either prior to or at the same time as the virtual asset transfer.\n                                        \n                                           \n                                    \n                                        \n                                            Record retention\n                                        \n                                        \n                                            5 years.\n                                        \n                                    \n                                \n                            \n                        \n                    \n                \n            \n\n            \n            Main actions required\n            \n                \n                    Obligations of the originating VASP\n                    The originating VASP must:\n                    \n                        obtain information about the originator and beneficiary from a client who initiated a virtual asset transfer;\n                        in accordance with the targeted financial sanctions regime, conduct AML screening against both the originator and beneficiary;\n                        verify information about the originator by comparing it with the information gathered during the KYC or KYB;\n                        carry out wallet attribution to establish which type of wallet &ndash; custodial or unhosted &ndash; is used on the other end and, if it is a custodial one, establish which VASP controls the wallet;\n                        verify an unhosted wallet to which the assets should be sent (if applicable);\n                        conduct transaction monitoring and report to the FIU if a suspicious transaction is identified;\n                        transmit information about the originator and beneficiary to the beneficiary or intermediary VASP; and\n                        keep records related to the transfer for as long as required by national legislation.\n                    \n                    Obligations of the beneficiary VASP\n                    The beneficiary VASP must:\n                    \n                        carry out wallet attribution to establish which type of wallet &ndash; custodial or unhosted &ndash; is used on the other end and, if it is a custodial one, establish which VASP controls the wallet (if necessary);\n                        verify an unhosted wallet from which the assets were received (if applicable);\n                        \n                            receive information about the originator and beneficiary from the originating or intermediary VASP (or obtain it directly from its customer if assets are received from an unhosted wallet) and ensure that the received information is\n                            complete by comparing it with the requirements in the originating VASP's jurisdiction;\n                        \n                        in accordance with the targeted financial sanctions regime, conduct AML screening against both the originator and beneficiary;\n                        verify information about the beneficiary by comparing it with the information gathered during the KYC or KYB;\n                        conduct transaction monitoring and report to the FIU if a suspicious transaction is identified; and\n                        keep records related to the transfer for as long as required by national legislation.\n                    \n                    Obligations of the intermediary VASP\n                    The intermediary VASP must:\n                    \n                        receive information about the originator and beneficiary from the previous VASP in the chain and ensure that the received information is complete by comparing it with the requirements in the originating VASP's jurisdiction;\n                        in accordance with the targeted financial sanctions regime, conduct AML screening against both the originator and beneficiary;\n                        carry out wallet attribution to establish which type of wallet &ndash; custodial or unhosted &ndash; is used on the other end and, if it is a custodial one, establish which VASP controls the wallet;\n                        verify an unhosted wallet from which the assets were received or to which they should be sent (if applicable);\n                        conduct transaction monitoring and report to the FIU if a suspicious transaction is identified;\n                        transmit information about the originator and beneficiary to the beneficiary or intermediary VASP; and\n                        keep records related to the transfer for as long as required by national legislation.\n                                       \n                \n            \n\n        \n    \n\n    \n        \n        \n            \n            General information\n            \n                \n                \n                    \n                        \n                            \n                                \n                                    \n                                        Subject\n                                    \n                                    \n                                        Details\n               Status\n                                        \n                                        \n                                            In force from May 12, 2022.\n                                        \n                                    \n                                    \n                                        \n                                            Regulation\n                                        \n                                        \n                                            \n                                                Money Laundering (Prevention and Prohibition) Act, 2022\n                                                Securities and Exchange Commission (capital market operators anti-money laundering and combating the financing of terrorism) Regulations, 2022\n                                            \n                                        \n                                    \n                                    \n Threshold\n                                        \n                                        \n                                            No threshold.                                     \n                                            Data to be shared\n                                        \n                                        \n                                            Originator:\n                                            \n                                                a) Full name;\n                                                b) Wallet address;\n                                                c) Physical address or national identity number or, where the originator is not a natural person, the incorporation number or business                    d) Full name;\n                                                e) Wallet address.\n                                            \n                                        \n
